entry.title: Mocha
entry.content:
packages.json

  "scripts": {
    "start": "node app.js",
    "test": "node ./node_modules/mocha/bin/mocha --recursive --timeout 500000 test/ --bail",
    "postinstall": "./node_modules/bower/bin/bower install"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "mocha": "^3.1.2",
    "supertest": "^2.0.1"
  }

test.js

const request = require('supertest')
const assert = require('assert')
const api = request(require('../app'));

const adminUser = {
  username: 'user',
  password: '123456',
  token: null,
}

function graphQl(query, variables) {
  var variables = variables || {};
  return api.post('/api').set('content-type', 'application/json').send(JSON.stringify({
    query,
    variables
  }));
}

describe('admin', function () {
  it('login', function (done) {
    graphQl('mutation($username: String!, $password: String!)' +
      ' {createToken(username: $username, password: $password) {apiKey, isSuperAdmin}}',
      JSON.stringify(adminUser)
    ).expect(200).end(function (err, rsp) {
      adminUser.token = rsp.body.data.createToken.apiKey;
      done();
    });
  });
});

describe('user-api', function () {
  const newUserNTID = 'id-' + new Date().getTime();
  it('get all', function (done) {
    graphQl(`query($page: Int!, $criteria: String) { 
      users(page: $page, criteria: $criteria) 
        { docs {ntId, hasRetail360Access, isAdmin, firstName, lastName} 
          total, limit, page, pages
        } 
      }`, {page: 1, criteria: ''}).expect(200).end(function (err, rsp) {
      done();
    });
  })

  it('create', function (done) {
    graphQl('mutation($token: String!, $user: UserInputCreate!) { addUser(token: $token, user: $user) { ntId } }',
      {
        user: {
          firstName: 'fname-unit-test',
          lastName: 'lname-unit-test',
          ntId: newUserNTID,
          hasRetail360Access: true,
          isAdmin: true
        },
        token: adminUser.token
      }).expect(200).end(function (err, rsp) {
      assert(rsp.body.data.addUser.ntId === newUserNTID);
      done();
    })
  });

  it('update', function (done) {
    graphQl(
      'mutation($ntId: String!, $user: UserInputUpdate!, $token: String!) ' +
      '{ updateUser(token: $token, ntId: $ntId, user: $user) { ntId } }',
      {
        ntId: newUserNTID,
        user: {
          firstName: 'fname-unit-test-updated',
          lastName: 'lname-unit-test',
          hasRetail360Access: false,
          isAdmin: false
        },
        token: adminUser.token
      })
      .expect(200, done);
  });

  it('find', function (done) {
    graphQl(`query($page: Int!, $criteria: String) {
      users(page: $page, criteria: $criteria)
        { docs {ntId, hasRetail360Access, isAdmin, firstName, lastName}
          total, limit, page, pages
        }
      }`, {page: 1, criteria: newUserNTID}).expect(200).end(function (err, rsp) {
      assert(rsp.body.data.users.docs[0].ntId === newUserNTID);
      done();
    });
  })

  it('delete', function (done) {
    graphQl(
      'mutation($ntId: String!, $token: String!) { deleteUser(token: $token, ntId: $ntId) { ntId } }', {
        ntId: newUserNTID,
        token: adminUser.token
      }).expect(200, done);
  });
});

review

"Should avoid duplicating code:
    const parser = parse({delimiter: ','}, function(err, data){
        console.log(data);
        length = data.length;
        count = 0;
        streamify(data).pipe(transformer)//.pipe(res);
    });
-- This block appears 2 times in app.js."

"Should remove commented out code:
        streamify(data).pipe(transformer)//.pipe(res);
  //hRow.append('<th>#</th>');
    //tRow.append('<th>'+ (i+1) +'</th>');"

"Should be consistent about putting a space after `if` or not:
      if(!result.errors) {
      if (count == length) {"

"Should use `===` instead of `==`:
      if (count == length) {"

"Should use single quotes consistently:
        s = """";
        s += x + "" records successfully added."";
...
        res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });"

"Should build the HTML error message to display in the frontend, not in the backend:
        if (y) {
            s += "" But the following "" + y + "" records failed: "";
            result_errors.forEach(function(e){
                s += ""\tRecord failed to add due to: ""+e +"""" ;
            })
        }
        res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });"

"Should terminate statements with semicolon:
var result_data = []
var result_errors = []
var length = 0 
var count = 0
    result_data = []
    result_errors = []"

"These modules should be under devDependencies, not dependencies:
    ""graphql-tester"": ""*"",
    ""nightwatch"": ""*"",
    ""selenium-download"": ""*"","

entry.title: Nodejs
entry.content:
npm

If you don’t have package.json already, generate it with:

npm init

For example, when can add jQuery as npm dependency by invoking:

npm install --save jquery

If you have a package.json file in your directory and you run npm install, then npm will look at the dependencies that are listed in that file and download the latest versions satisfying semver rules for all of those.

vi package.json

  "scripts": {
    "start": "node app.js",
    "test": "./node_modules/.bin/nightwatch --env local",
    "postinstall": "./node_modules/bower/bin/bower install"
  },

browserify

First, start by installing Browserify globally as a command-line tool: npm install -g browserify

We can now pass our app script to browserify: browserify app.js -o bundle.js

And out comes a full, browser-friendly bundle which can be included with a single script tag: < script src="bundle.js" > </ script>

Stay productive by installing and using watchify to efficiently recompile your bundle on each change: watchify app.js -o bundle.js

nvm

curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/creationix/nvm/v0.25.0/install.sh | bash
nvm install stable
nvm ls
nvm use stable
npm rebuild

error

var server = http.createServer(handleRequest);
server.on('error', function (e) {
  // Handle your error here
  console.log(e.stack);
});

entry.title: Todos
entry.content:
backbonejs

  • jQuery, undersocre
  • webpy, mako

Here.

todos

here

Model

var Todo = Backbone.Model.extend({

    defaults: {
        title: "empty todo...",
        order: Todos.nextOrder(),
        done: false
    },

    toggle: function() {
        this.save({done: !this.get("done")});
    }
});

Collection

var TodoList = Backbone.Collection.extend({
    model: Todo,
    localStorage: new Backbone.LocalStorage("todos-backbone"),

    done: function() {
        return this.where({done: true});
    },

    remaining: function() {
        return this.where({done: false});
    },

    nextOrder: function() {
        if (!this.length) return 1;
        return this.last().get('order') + 1;
    },

    comparator: 'order'
});

View

var Todos = new TodoList;

var TodoView = Backbone.View.extend({

    //下面这个标签的作用是，把template模板中获取到的html代码放到这标签中。
    tagName:  "li",

    // 获取一个任务条目的模板,缓存到这个属性上。
    template: _.template($('#item-template').html()),

    // 为每一个任务条目绑定事件
    events: {
        "click .toggle"   : "toggleDone",
        "dblclick .view"  : "edit",
        "click a.destroy" : "clear",
        "keypress .edit"  : "updateOnEnter",
        "blur .edit"      : "close"
    },

    //在初始化时设置对model的change事件的监听
    //设置对model的destroy的监听，保证页面数据和model数据一致
    initialize: function() {
        this.listenTo(this.model, 'change', this.render);
        //这个remove是view的中的方法，用来清除页面中的dom
        this.listenTo(this.model, 'destroy', this.remove);
    },

    // 渲染todo中的数据到 item-template 中，然后返回对自己的引用this
    render: function() {
        this.$el.html(this.template(this.model.toJSON()));
        this.$el.toggleClass('done', this.model.get('done'));
        this.input = this.$('.edit');
        return this;
    },

    toggleDone: function() {
        this.model.toggle();
    },

    edit: function() {
        $(this.el).addClass("editing");
        this.input.focus();
    },

    close: function() {
        var value = this.input.val();
        if (!value) {
            this.clear();
        } else {
            this.model.save({title: value});
            this.$el.removeClass("editing");
        }
    },

    updateOnEnter: function(e) {
      if (e.keyCode == 13) this.close();
    },

    clear: function() {
        this.model.destroy();
    }
});

web.py

pip install web.py

vi server.py

import web

urls = (
    '/', 'index'
)
app = web.application(urls, globals())

class index:
    def GET(self):
        return 'Hello, World!'

if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run()

python server.py

require.js

  • AMD: Asynchronous Module Definition, require.js
  • CMD: Common Module Definition, sea.js

entry.title: jQuery
entry.content:
sortTable

//  sortTable(f,n)
//  f : 1 ascending order, -1 descending order
//  n : n-th child(<td>) of <tr>

function sortTable(f,n){
  var rows = $('#entities-table tbody  tr').get();
  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    var A = getVal(a);
    var B = getVal(b);

    if(A < B) {
        return -1*f;
    }
    if(A > B) {
      return 1*f;
    }
    return 0;
  });

  function getVal(elm){
    var v = $(elm).children('td').eq(n).text().toUpperCase();
    if(!v && $(elm).children('td').eq(n).find('input').length) {
      v = $(elm).children('td').eq(n).children('input').is(':checked');
    }
    if($.isNumeric(v)){
      v = parseInt(v,10);
    }
    //console.log(v);
    return v;
  }

  $.each(rows, function(index, row) {
    $('#entities-table').children('tbody').append(row);
  });
}

  $('th').hover(function() {
    $(this).css('color', 'red');
  }, function() {
    $(this).css('color', '');
  });

  $('th').click(function(){
    var n = $(this).prevAll().length;
    flag[n] *= -1;
    sortTable(flag[n], n);
  });

getJSON

$.getJSON(url, data, func) sends a GET request to url and will send the contents of the data object as query parameters. Once the data arrived, it will call the given function with the return value as argument.

$(document).ready(function() {
    function video_time_update() {
        var videoplayer = $('video').get(0);
        // ...
    }

    video_time_update();
}

iframe

aa = $$("a")
for (var i = 0; i < aa.length; ++i) {
    aa[i].onclick = function() {return false;}
    aa[i].click();
}

$(selector).change(function)

该事件仅适用于文本域（text field），以及 textarea 和 select 元素。

jshint

jslint used to be the preferred tool for static JavaScript checking. Later it was forked into jshint.

jshint foo.js

The preferred way to configure jshint is to create a json configure file called .jshintrc.

jshint -c .jshintrc foo.js

You can see current list of all available options here and their explanations.

{
    "esnext": true, // Allow ES.next (ES6) syntax (ex: `const`) 
    "indent": 2,
    "maxlen": 80, // Max number of characters per line
    "freeze": true, // prohibits overwriting prototypes of native objects such as Array, Date etc.
    "camelcase": true, // Identifiers must be in camelCase
    "unused": true, // all variables, last function parameter
    "eqnull": true, // Tolerate use of `== null`
    "proto": true, // Tolerate using the `__proto__` property
    "supernew": true, // Tolerate `new function () { ... };` and `new Object;`
    "noyield": true, // Tolerate generator functions with no yield statement in them.
    "evil": true, // Tolerate use of `eval` and `new Function()
    "node": true, // Node.js
    "boss": true, // Tolerate assignments where comparisons would be expected
    "expr": true, // Tolerate `ExpressionStatement` as Programs
    "loopfunc": true, // Tolerate functions being defined in loops
    "white": true, // Check against strict whitespace and indentation rules
    "maxdepth": 4 // Max depth of nested blocks (within functions)
}

entry.title: Event Listener
entry.content:
sudo -i
rm /edx/var/mongo/mongodb/mongod.lock
sudo -u mongodb mongod --dbpath /edx/var/mongo/mongodb --repair --repairpath /edx/var/mongo/mongodb
start mongod
exit
sudo su edxapp

paver devstack lms > lms.log 2>&1 &
paver devstack --fast studio > studio.log 2>&1 &

lms/urls.py
lms/djangoapps/courseware/mu.py

lms/templates/courseware/courseware.html 
lms/static/js/mu.js

lms/static/videos

mongo

> db.problem.findOne()
{
        "_id" : ObjectId("574d30828524fe0e3644b402"),
        "text" : "某公司20XX年总负债100万元，其中有息负债30万元，全部为银行贷款，资产负债率40%，其银行贷款利率为8%，该行业平均收益水平为12%，A公司的企业所得税率为25%，请计算A公司的加权平均资本成本?|||multiplechoiceresponse|||{\"A\": {\"detail\": \"10.4%\"}, \"C\": {\"detail\": \"11%\", \"correct\": \"true\"}, \"B\": {\"detail\": \"10.33%\"}, \"D\": {\"detail\": \"9.6%\"}}",
        "id" : "0074debadb964eee8a0a18ee7ae44a25_2_1"
}

> db.knowledge_point.findOne()
{
        "_id" : ObjectId("574d691d8524fe0e3644b495"),
        "begin" : 17,
        "end" : 545,
        "problem" : [
                "fdb7429f7aa844e38f04b7f49fbb9f8d_9_1"
        ],
        "id" : "cb796df9b2584f609a58a3fa8f858031_0"
}

> db.video_knowledge_point.findOne()
{
        "_id" : ObjectId("574ed22a8524fe0e3644b641"),
        "hot_point" : [
                "23,129",
                "192,198",
                "239,277"
        ],
        "id" : "86efb9a1b3b949839d9f540f1359f261",
        "knowledge_point" : [
                "86efb9a1b3b949839d9f540f1359f261_0",
                "86efb9a1b3b949839d9f540f1359f261_1",
                "86efb9a1b3b949839d9f540f1359f261_2",
                "86efb9a1b3b949839d9f540f1359f261_3"
        ]
}

problem_knowledgepoint

vi ~/edx-platform/lms/static/js/mu.js

$.get("/mu/problem/knowledgepoint/"+current_problem_id+"/", function(data){
    console.log('knowledge point received')
    console.log(data);
})

vi ~/edx-platform/lms/djangoapps/courseware/mu.py

def get_problem_knowledgepoint(request, problem_id):
    print problem_id
    problem_id = 'fdb7429f7aa844e38f04b7f49fbb9f8d_9_1'

    client = MongoClient('10.9.10.15', 27017)
    db = client.mu
    collection = db.knowledge_point
    data = {}
    cur = collection.find({'problem':problem_id})
    for item in cur:
        data[problem_id] = data.get(problem_id, []) + item['problem']
    return HttpResponse(json.dumps(data), content_type = 'application/json')

vi ~/edx-platform/lms/urls.py

urlpatterns += (
    url(r'^mu/problem/knowledgepoint/([\w\d]+)/$', 'courseware.mu.get_problem_knowledgepoint', name = 'get_problem_knowledgepoint'),
)

onunload

~/edx-platform$ grep -r page_close .
./common/static/js/src/logger.js
vi ./common/static/js/src/logger.js

window.onunload = function() {

}

timeupdate

~/edx-platform$ grep -r seek_video .
./lms/static/xmodule_js/src/video/09_events_plugin.js
vi ./lms/static/xmodule_js/src/video/09_events_plugin.js
vi ./lms/static/xmodule_js/src/video/03_video_player.js

var lastUnixTimeStamp;
var lastCurrentVideoTime;
videoplayer.addEventListener('timeupdate',function(){

    if( !lastUnixTimeStamp && !lastCurrentVideoTime ){  
         //not defined at first timeupdate event
         lastUnixTimeStamp = new Date().getTime();
         lastCurrentVideoTime = videoplayer.currentTime;
         return;
    }

    var videoTimeOffset = videoplayer.currentTime - lastCurrentVideoTime; 
    var realTimeOffset = new Date().getTime() - lastUnixTimeStamp;  
    lastUnixTimeStamp = new Date().getTime();
    lastCurrentVideoTime = videoplayer.currentTime;
    // logic
})

scrollx

function scrollx(){
    $('iframe#mu').css({
        'border':'none',
        'position':'fixed',
        'height':'280px',
        'right':'0',
        'bottom':'0'
    });
}

type

var data_id = $('div.vert').attr('data-id');
var type = data_id.split('+')[3].split('@')[1];

sequence-nav

$('div.sequence-nav').click(function(){
    console.log('sequence-list clicked.')
})

$('div.sequence-nav').mouseover($.debounce(500, function(){
        console.log('sequence-nav mouse over.');
}))

div.problem

$('div.vert-mod').delegate('div.problem', 'click', function(event){
    console.log('problem clicked');
    var temp = $(event.target).parent();
    while (!temp.attr('id') || !temp.attr('id').startsWith('problem_')) {
        console.log(temp);
        temp = temp.parent();
    }
    current_problem_id = temp.attr('id').split('_')[1];
    console.log(current_problem_id);
    // current_problem_id = event.target;
})

div.course-index

$('div.course-index').mouseover($.debounce(1000, function(){
    current_correct_rate = 1.0 * $('button.show').length / $('div.problem').length;
    console.log('course-index mouse over');
    console.log('current_corrent_rate: '+current_correct_rate);
}))

sendMessage

function sendMessage(message){
    var iframeWin = $('iframe#mu')[0].contentWindow;
    domain = 'http://112.74.68.45/player/output/huiAS3html.html'
    iframeWin.postMessage(message, domain)
}

seq_content

$('div#seq_content').bind('DOMNodeInserted', $.debounce(250, function(){
    console.log('seq_content content changed')
}))
